thinking:
**Refining The Animation Logic**

I'm currently focused on the animation logic, aiming for a symmetric setup. I intend to replace lines 230-236 with a structure where the right-side beams connect from the right nodes to the center node. I'm using positive and negative curvatures and the `reverse={true}` property to achieve an outward, pulsing animation from the center to the right.

args.Description: "Swap connection nodes and curvatures on the right side of the AnimatedBeam diagram so they connect from the right node to the center node with reverse={true}. This makes the right side curves bend outwards symmetrically to the left side and prevents them from crossing."
args.Instruction: "Make right side beams curve outwards symmetrically in features-section-14.tsx."
